utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present with costs but lacks explicit mention of mental health; property_coverage is null (missing); travel_coverage is present but lacks costs; additional_services is present but lacks costs; total_budget is present with monthly/annual costs. Fully specified per format requires costs for each item and explicit scope (e.g., health must include physical and mental with costs; property must include home/contents with costs; travel must include costs; additional_services must include costs). Only total_budget meets the cost requirement. Health_coverage includes costs but not mental health explicitly, so not fully specified. Travel and additional_services lack costs; property is missing.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists a health provider named EliteCare Premium, which corresponds to EliteCare Premium Plan entries in the ground-truth ratings. It includes health coverage (implicitly physical and mental under the same brand), and travel coverage marked as included in the health plan but does not name a separate travel insurance product. There is no property coverage selected. Therefore, the only mappable item by exact name from the ground-truth catalog is EliteCare Premium Plan. Since the ground truth provides separate ratings for EliteCare Premium Plan under physical health (rating 10) and mental health (rating 10), and the plan references a single 'EliteCare Premium' provider without distinguishing, we map to the named item 'EliteCare Premium Plan' with its rating of 10.
